title: penstemon pandus
intro: Penstemon pandus, also known as Beardtongue, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and relieve digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Penstemon pandus have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
